texto: the Devil's hand directs our every movethe things we loathed become the things we love
autor: day by day we drop through stinking shadesquite undeterred on our descent to Hell.
explicacao: Citação de day by day we drop through stinking shadesquite undeterred on our descent to Hell. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “the Devil's hand directs our every movethe things we loathed become the things we love” articula reflexao, charles-baudelaire, things em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
